\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3634 introduces Coupling Constant Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} u(t) = \arg\min_{u\in\mathcal{U}} \left( \alpha V(x,t) - \beta Q(u) \right), \end{equation}
